zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Clifton於1490年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓時，他的父親Sir John Clifton, Sheriff of Nottingham, Treasurer of Calais21歲，母親Ella Bennett19歲。他和Lady Elizabeth Blount至少有2個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1564年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴林頓享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特巴林頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Clifton于1490年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾克里夫頓时，他的父亲Sir John Clifton, Sheriff of Nottingham, Treasurer of Calais21岁，母亲Ella Bennett19岁。他和Lady Elizabeth Blount至少有2个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1564年在英国英格兰薩默塞特巴林頓享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特巴林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Clifton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the very numerous places called Clifton, from Old English clif ‘slope’ (see Cliff ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Cliff
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cliff(e), Cle(e)ve, or Clive, from Old English clif ‘slope, bank, cliff’, or a topographic name from the same word. The Old English word was used not only in the sense of modern English cliff but also of much gentler slopes and frequently also of a riverbank or seashore.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Clifton was born in 1490, in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Clifton, Sheriff of Nottingham, Treasurer of Calais, was 21 and his mother, Ella Bennett, was 19. He had at least 2 sons and 5 daughters with Lady Elizabeth Blount. He died in 1564, in Barrington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 74, and was buried in Barrington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Clifton est né en 1490, à Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Clifton, Sheriff of Nottingham, Treasurer of Calais, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Ella Bennett, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles avec Lady Elizabeth Blount. Il est décédé en 1564, à Barrington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Barrington, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Clifton 1490 in Clifton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Clifton, Sheriff of Nottingham, Treasurer of Calais 21 und seine Mutter Ella Bennett 19. Er hatte mit Lady Elizabeth Blount mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1564 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Barrington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Barrington, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Clifton è nato il nel 1490 nel Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Clifton, Sheriff of Nottingham, Treasurer of Calais, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Ella Bennett, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie con Lady Elizabeth Blount. Morì nel 1564, nel Barrington, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Barrington, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Cliftonが1490年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアクリフトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Clifton, Sheriff of Nottingham, Treasurer of Calaisは21歳，母Ella Bennettは19歳であった。彼はLady Elizabeth Blountとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1564年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトバーリントンで74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトバーリントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Clifton(이)가 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 클리프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Clifton, Sheriff of Nottingham, Treasurer of Calais(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Ella Bennett(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Lady Elizabeth Blount(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1564년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 배링턴에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 배링턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Clifton nasceu em 1490, em Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Clifton, Sheriff of Nottingham, Treasurer of Calais, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Ella Bennett, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas com Lady Elizabeth Blount. Ele faleceu em 1564, em Barrington, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Barrington, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Clifton родился в 1490 г. в местности клифтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Clifton, Sheriff of Nottingham, Treasurer of Calais было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Ella Bennett, 19. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей от Lady Elizabeth Blount. Он умер в 1564 г. в местности баррингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности баррингтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Clifton nació en 1490, en Clifton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Clifton, Sheriff of Nottingham, Treasurer of Calais, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Ella Bennett, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas con Lady Elizabeth Blount. Murió en 1564, en Barrington, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Barrington, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
